last_action: Added Grouping documentation section to feature-flags.mdx, app-features.mdx, permissions.mdx per user CP1 feedback

T001.did: Added optional group?: string field with JSDoc to ToolbarFlag, ToolbarAppFeature, ToolbarPermission

T002.did: Added collapsedGroups?: string[] to ToolViewState following the existing pinnedIds optional-array pattern

T003.did: Implemented groupItems<T> generic utility partitioning items into pinned/groups/ungrouped using a single-pass Map for O(n) bucketing

T004.did: Added 11 Jest unit tests covering backward-compat, group sort, item sort, mixed grouped/ungrouped, pinned extraction, and pinned alpha sort

T005.did: Created ToolbarListGroupComponent with collapsible header, ng-content projection, aria-expanded, and CSS-rendered triangle chevron
concerns: Used a CSS triangle chevron instead of an icon component because IconName enum has no chevron-* entries — adding to icon set would require new SVG asset

T006.did: Added TestBed-based component tests for header text, content projection, collapse hides content, click toggle emits negated value, and aria-expanded reflection

T007.did: Added export * from './components/list-group/list-group.component' to libs/ngx-dev-toolbar/src/index.ts next to existing list-item export

T008.did: Refactored feature-flags-tool: added collapsedGroups signal, split filteredFlags into pure filter + groupedFlags + flatFlags computeds, template uses ng-template + NgTemplateOutlet to share list-item block across pinned/groups/other/flat sections

T009.did: Mirrored T008 pattern in app-features-tool with feature-named identifiers (groupedFeatures, flatFeatures, featureItem template)

T010.did: Mirrored T008 pattern in permissions-tool with permission-named identifiers (groupedPermissions, flatPermissions, permissionItem template)

T011.did: Tagged demo flags/features/permissions with groups (Appearance/Dashboard/Experimental, Admin/Content/Dashboard, Reporting/Branding/Communication/Integration). Updated 2 pre-existing component specs that asserted ordering on the now filter-only filteredX computed. Final: 387/387 tests pass, lint clean (15 pre-existing warnings, 0 errors), prod build green.
concerns: Updated 2 pre-existing component specs to follow renamed computeds — feature-flags spec now asserts on flatFlags() (the no-groups equivalent), permissions spec now uses order-agnostic name comparison since filteredPermissions no longer sorts

decisions.note: CSS triangle chevron over icon-system addition — keeps change self-contained, no SVG asset pipeline edit
Used NgTemplateOutlet + single ng-template to dedupe the 17-line list-item block instead of 4× repetition
Split legacy filteredFlags computed: filter step is now pure filter (private), pinned-first sort moved into flatFlags + groupItems()

concerns.note: CSS triangle chevron used instead of IconName-based icon — note for CP1 if reviewer prefers an icon SVG

Updated 2 pre-existing component specs (feature-flags + permissions) that were asserting on the legacy filteredX() sort behavior — feature-flags now asserts flatFlags(), permissions uses order-agnostic name comparison

approach: Shared groupItems utility partitions filtered items into pinned/groups/ungrouped, rendered via a new ToolbarListGroupComponent

specify.key_finding: All 3 tools share identical pinned-first sort logic in a computed signal — grouping can be layered into the same computed with a shared helper

plan.approach_summary: Shared groupItems utility partitions filtered items into pinned/groups/ungrouped, rendered via a new ToolbarListGroupComponent
risks: Template complexity from nested @for with conditional group headers
Backward compat regression if groupItems() mishandles the all-ungrouped case
